system.flavor: You sow a line of rapidly growing plants or mushrooms that release a sticky healing sap.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d3 damage
Area effect: 2 damage
On hit a bouncing spore adjacent to your foe, then summon a bouncing spore in every adverse terrain space in the area.

Bouncing Spore
Summon (3)
Effect or an ally entering or exiting a spore's space can pop it, dismissing the spore, gaining 1 vigor and ignoring any terrain movement penalties or damage in this space. If this is the third spore or more they have popped this turn, increase vigor by +1d3.
